exploration_notes: The Kafka Streams topology build chain flows as follows: (1) StreamsBuilder.build() delegates to InternalStreamsBuilder.buildAndOptimizeTopology(), which traverses the DSL graph nodes and writes each to the InternalTopologyBuilder via writeToTopology(). (2) InternalTopologyBuilder holds nodeFactories, stateFactories, and builds the ProcessorTopology via its private build() method, which iterates nodeFactories in topological order, creating ProcessorNode/SourceNode/SinkNode instances and wiring s
